description: Configure GPredict for an Arctic expedition by setting up a high-latitude ground station, creating a polar weather tracking module, and customizing the map visualization. Create a ground station named 'RV_Polarstern' at 82.5000 N, 15.0000 E (0m altitude) and set it as the default ground station for the application. Create a tracking module named 'Arctic_WX' containing satellites NOAA 15 (25338), NOAA 18 (28654), and NOAA 19 (33591). Configure the map display to enable the Map Grid and Day/Night Terminator, and set the number of orbits to show for ground tracks to 2. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'. GPredict is already open.
